arts.ttl: When is Celta Vigo vs Real Madrid? Times, how to watch on TV and stream online
arts.sum: Following the October international break, Real Madrid return to LaLiga action against Celta Vigo, who Los Blancos have beaten in the teams' last eight meetings . The LaLiga matchday-10 game between Celta Vigo and Real Madrid will be played at the Estadio Abanca-Balaídos in Vigo, Spain, on Saturday October 19, 2024.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury update ahead of Celta clash: Mbappé, Vincius, Bellingham, Courtois...
arts.sum: None of the nine players on international duty suffered injuries, and Kylian Mbappé, Thibaut Courtois, Vinícius Jr, and Éder Militão, who have been following specific training plans, as well as Andriy Lunin, who recovered from gastroenteritis, are all ready for the match against Claudio Giráldez’s team. Of the four players who were dealing with injuries, the one who has remained most uncertain was Thibaut Courtois, who has been recovering from an adductor injury in his left leg, which caused him to miss the last two matches before the break (against Lille and Villarreal).

arts.ttl: Two more clubs join Real Madrid in the race to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: According to talkSPORT, Barcelona and Bayern Munich have joined Real Madrid in the race to sign Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold. The England international has entered the final year of his contract at Anfield and his long term future at the club remains uncertain. Spanish giants Real Madrid have shown the most interest in signing the […] The post Two more clubs join Real Madrid in the race to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Cambiaso: ‘Juventus are my Real Madrid’, grateful to Allegri but Motta a ‘visionary’
arts.sum: Juventus defender Andrea Cambiaso calls Thiago Motta a ‘visionary’ and insists the Bianconeri are a...

The Liverpool full-back’s contract expires next summer, and he has yet to sign an extension, which means he could arrive on a free transfer, a strategy that has worked well for Madrid in recent years, as seen with players like Mbappé, Rüdiger, and Alaba. Valued at €50 million, any move for Frimpong would involve negotiating with Leverkusen, a club Madrid has good relations with (Carvajal spent a year there).

Celta approach the match buoyed by their recent triumph at the Gran Canaria Stadium, breaking a spell of unfavorable results and securing their first clean sheet in a considerable time. Positioned nin...

arts.ttl: Cambiaso: “Juventus is my Real Madrid, Thiago Motta is a visionary”
arts.sum: Juventus defender Andrea Cambiaso played down links with Real Madrid, insisting he is committed to the Bianconeri. Following excellent performances with the national team, he recently gave an extensive interview to Corriere dello Sport. Reflecting on his journey, Cambiaso said, “Gatti and I are survivors, starting from amateur leagues and making it to Juve. I feel fortunate every day I open my eyes. I’m hungry and eager to succeed. When I think about the road I’ve traveled and where I am today, it makes my head spin. So I prefer to keep running. Football puts you in the spotlight when The post Cambiaso: “Juventus is my Real Madrid, Thiago Motta is a visionary” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Agent Bellingham! Real Madrid star in talks with Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Alexander-Arnold has emerged as a priority target for Real Madrid following news of Dani Caravjal’s ACL injury and Los Blancos are ready to sign the 26-year-old as they look to bolster their backline next year. The England international has less than 12 months remaining on his current Liverpool contract and he will become a free agent in 2025 unless he decides to sign a new deal with the Anfield outfit.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: How Would Trent Alexander-Arnold Fit At Real Madrid?
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Matt Wiltse discuss: Kiyan and Matt discuss how realistic TAA’s signing is and how he would fit tactically
